positive: Minimalist geometric celestial forest scene, featuring bioluminescent floating flora and abstract glowing constellations amidst stylized oak branches. The composition must be perfectly centered and symmetrical, utilizing strong contrast between deep midnight indigo backgrounds and vibrant, glowing neon-teal and lavender elements. Style should be graphic, ethereal, and highly detailed, like a mix of Art Nouveau and modern vector art. Clean silhouettes are crucial for print transfer. Soft, magical ambient lighting, octane render, flat graphic print quality, perfect symmetry, high contrast, suitable for apparel print.
negative: text, signature, logo, watermark, copyright, lowres, blurry, fuzzy, messy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noisy, artifacts, grain, poorly drawn, grayscale, cartoon, childish
